zh.lifeSummary: 當lorwerth ap Caradog於大約1160年出生在英國諾福爾可斯萬頓 摩利時，他的父親Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos36歲，母親Maude Matilda Fitz Walter24歲。他於1190年之前與Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1174年被列為steward。他去世於1250年9月9日在英國諾福爾可洛頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当lorwerth ap Caradog于大约1160年出生在英国諾福爾可斯萬頓 摩利时，他的父亲Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos36岁，母亲Maude Matilda Fitz Walter24岁。他于1190年之前与Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1174年被列为steward。他去世于1250年9月9日在英国諾福爾可洛頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: lorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When lorwerth ap Caradog was born about 1160, in Swanton Morley, Norfolk, England, his father, Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos, was 36 and his mother, Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, was 24. He married Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear before 1190, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1174, at the age of 17, his occupation is listed as steward. He died on 9 September 1250, in Roydon, Norfolk, England, at the age of 91.

fr.Penrhos, Wales: Penrhos, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque lorwerth ap Caradog est né environ 1160, à Swanton Morley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear avant 1190, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1174, à l’âge de 17 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1250, à Roydon, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als lorwerth ap Caradog um 1160 in Swanton Morley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos 36 und seine Mutter Maude Matilda Fitz Walter 24. Er hat vor 1190 in Europa Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1174, als er 17 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. September 1250 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Roydon, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando lorwerth ap Caradog è nato il circa 1160 nel Swanton Morley, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear prima del 1190, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1174, all'età di 17 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward. Morì il 9 settembre 1250, nel Roydon, Norfolk, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: lorwerth ap Caradogが約1160年にイギリスノーフォルクスワントン モーリーで生まれた時，父Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhosは36歳，母Maude Matilda Fitz Walterは24歳であった。1190年以前にヨーロッパでAlis verch Bleddyn Broadspearと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1174年，17歳の時，職業はstewardと記録されている。彼は1250年9月9日にイギリスノーフォルクロイドンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: lorwerth ap Caradog(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 노르폴크 스완턴 모를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Matilda Fitz Walter(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1190년 이전 우럽에서 Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1174년, 17세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward이었다. 그는 1250년 9월 9일 영국 노르폴크 로이던에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando lorwerth ap Caradog nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Swanton Morley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear antes 1190, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1174, com 17 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1250, em Roydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда lorwerth ap Caradog родился около 1160 г. в местности свантон морли, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear перед 1190 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1174 году, в возрасте 17 лет,  он работал по профессии steward. Он умер 9 сентября 1250 г. в местности роидон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando lorwerth ap Caradog nació aproximadamente 1160, en Swanton Morley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Caradog ap Meurig of Penrhos, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maude Matilda Fitz Walter, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alis verch Bleddyn Broadspear antes de 1190, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1174, a la edad de 17 años, su ocupación registrada era steward. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1250, en Roydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
